title: tetragonolobus biflorus
intro: Tetragonolobus biflorus, also known as horse gram or hura, is a plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. It is a legume rich in protein, fiber, and minerals, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetragonolobus biflorus include reducing cholesterol levels, managing diabetes, and supporting digestive health, making it a valuable addition to a balanced diet. Tetragonolobus biflorus can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
